pi_items.source: Decompiled APK analysis (res/values/strings.xml and res/xml/) of com.sygic.aura version 26.0.2. No 'power_saving' or similar key exists.
The string 'Always' exists in res/values/strings.xml, but it is not associated with a power saving or battery management setting as such settings do not exist in this version.
Decompiled APK analysis confirms the target setting does not exist, so there is no associated integer value mapping.
Decompiled APK analysis (res/values/strings.xml and res/xml/) of com.sygic.aura version 26.0.2. The string 'Battery management' does not exist in the app's resources.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura), a real Android application, using APK version 26.0.2. The task metadata claims the user must configure a 'Power saving' setting within a 'Battery management' menu. Exhaustive analysis of the decompiled APK resources confirms that neither 'Battery management' nor 'Power saving' menus or settings exist in this version of the app. All battery-related string resources in this version refer strictly to Electric Vehicle (EV) features (e.g., battery capacity, charging power). Furthermore, the verifier attempts to validate the task by reading standard Android SharedPreferences (com.sygic.aura_preferences.xml), whereas Sygic GPS actually stores its core settings in a proprietary binary file (settings2.dat). Because the target UI elements do not exist and the underlying configuration storage assumption is incorrect, the task cannot be completed or verified as described.
